title: Campylandra delavayi
taxonomy: Campylandra delavayi is classified as a species within the genus Campylandra, which belongs to the family Asparagaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf and flower morphology. The plant is further categorized under the family Asparagaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The genus Campylandra is itself part of the Asparagales order, which consists of various plant families with similar characteristics. Campylandra delavayi's classification is subject to ongoing research and potential revisions.

parts: Campylandra delavayi, the medicinal parts of this plant are typically used in traditional Chinese medicine.
